import torch
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

# Check CSV
train_csv = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train.csv'))
print(f'Train CSV shape: {train_csv.shape}')
print(f'Columns: {train_csv.columns.tolist()}')
print(f'Target stats: mean={train_csv["target"].mean():.4f}, std={train_csv["target"].std():.4f}, min={train_csv["target"].min():.4f}, max={train_csv["target"].max():.4f}')

val_csv = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val.csv'))
print(f'Val CSV shape: {val_csv.shape}')

# Check 3D data
train_3d = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'train_3d.pt'))
print(f'\nTrain 3D: {len(train_3d)} molecules')
mol = train_3d[0]
print(f'Keys: {mol.keys()}')
print(f'z shape: {mol["z"].shape}, pos shape: {mol["pos"].shape}')
print(f'z: {mol["z"]}')
print(f'target: {mol["target"]}')
print(f'smiles: {mol["smiles"]}')

# Check atom types
all_z = set()
max_atoms = 0
for m in train_3d[:1000]:
    all_z.update(m['z'].tolist())
    max_atoms = max(max_atoms, len(m['z']))
print(f'\nAtom types in first 1000: {sorted(all_z)}')
print(f'Max atoms in first 1000: {max_atoms}')

val_3d = torch.load(os.path.join(data_dir, 'val_3d.pt'))
print(f'Val 3D: {len(val_3d)} molecules')
